title: EUR/USD — At the Crossroads of Monetary Expectations
text: The fundamental backdrop for EUR/USD in early May is shaped by diverging monetary policy expectations on both sides of the Atlantic. At its 30 April meeting, the ECB left interest rates unchanged; however, Governing Council members Joachim Nagel and Peter Kazimir signalled the possibility of a rate hike as early as June amid persistent inflationary pressure.
